golden_categories.name: Basic Email Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating standard email addresses without additional constraints.

golden_categories.name: Domain-Specific Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with domain-specific rules.

golden_categories.name: Underscore in Domain
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with underscores allowed in the domain.

golden_categories.name: UTF8 Local Part Restriction
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses without UTF8 characters in the local part.

golden_categories.name: Display Name Support
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with optional display names.

golden_categories.name: Required Display Name
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses where display names are mandatory.

golden_categories.name: IP Domain Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with IPs allowed in the domain.

golden_categories.name: Blacklisted Characters in Name
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with restrictions on specific characters in the name.

golden_categories.name: Max Length Enforcement
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with maximum length restrictions.

golden_categories.name: Ignore Max Length
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with maximum length ignored.

golden_categories.name: Host Blacklist
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with denylisted domains.

golden_categories.name: Host Whitelist
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with whitelisted domains.

generated_categories.name: Default Validation
generated_categories.description: Covers the default behavior of the isEmail validator, ensuring standard email formats are validated and non-string inputs throw errors.

generated_categories.name: Display Name Handling
generated_categories.description: Tests related to the handling of display names in email addresses, including allowing or requiring display names.

generated_categories.name: IP Domain Handling
generated_categories.description: Validates email addresses with IP domains when the allow_ip_domain option is enabled.

generated_categories.name: UTF-8 Local Part Restrictions
generated_categories.description: Tests the behavior when UTF-8 characters in the local part of the email are disallowed.

generated_categories.name: Character Blacklisting
generated_categories.description: Validates the behavior of the validator when specific characters are blacklisted in the local part of the email.

generated_categories.name: Host Blacklisting
generated_categories.description: Ensures that emails with blacklisted domains are correctly invalidated.

golden_to_generated.reason: Both categories focus on validating standard email formats without additional constraints.
No generated category explicitly addresses domain-specific validation rules.
No generated category explicitly addresses underscores in the domain.
Both categories focus on disallowing UTF-8 characters in the local part of the email.
GENC-2 covers allowing display names, but does not explicitly address optional display names.
GENC-2 covers requiring display names, but does not explicitly address mandatory display names as a separate focus.
Both categories focus on validating email addresses with IP domains.
Both categories focus on blacklisting specific characters in the email name.
No generated category explicitly addresses maximum length enforcement.
No generated category explicitly addresses ignoring maximum length restrictions.
Both categories focus on blacklisting specific domains.
No generated category explicitly addresses whitelisting specific domains.

generated_to_golden.reason: GENC-1 aligns with GC-1 in validating standard email formats without additional constraints.
GENC-2 covers display name handling broadly, partially aligning with GC-5 and GC-6.
GENC-3 aligns with GC-7 in validating email addresses with IP domains.
GENC-4 aligns with GC-4 in disallowing UTF-8 characters in the local part of the email.
GENC-5 aligns with GC-8 in blacklisting specific characters in the email name.
GENC-6 aligns with GC-11 in blacklisting specific domains.

missing_golden_categories.reason: No generated categories achieved strong or partial semantic overlap with this fixed golden category.
